{{Quote|Yes, hello. Welcome to the township of Bestine. Sandy jewel in the Imperial crown, as I'm sure you'll find. Now, if you'll excuse me, I have business with my associate here.|Colonel Gert Talnin|<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref>}}
[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''Gert Talnin''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in charge of the [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]] starport on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. All incoming and outgoing space travel had to be authorized by him.

Talnin owed [[Wlinc Tchrr]] (a Hutt bookmaker) money from gambling bets. He unsuccessfully tried to pay his debt with travel vouchers, which Tchrr didn't accept.

==Behind the scenes==
Colonel Gert Talnin is a [[Wikipedia:non-player character|Non-Player Character]] (NPC) in the [[Wikipedia:MMORPG|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' and can be found in front of the Bestine starport.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
